understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' in the semantic grid is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, then repeat this across all levels until the game reports WIN for the full run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in that direction, but moves could be blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects; some adjacent objects were pushable so attempting to move into them could push them along if space allowed. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces, and control switched using CLICK with an exact pixel-coordinate target matching a selectable’s listed position; CLICK only changed which piece was controlled and did not move the piece itself.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' in the semantic grid is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, then repeat this across all levels until the game reports WIN for the full run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in that direction, but moves could be blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects; some adjacent objects were pushable so attempting to move into them could push them along if space allowed. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces, and control switched using CLICK with an exact pixel-coordinate target matching a selectable’s listed position; CLICK only changed which piece was controlled and did not move the piece itself.
